ov_overview_body.en: Six Flags Over Texas is the original Six Flags park — the first park in the Six Flags chain, opened in 1961 in Arlington, Texas, between Dallas and Fort Worth. The park is home to Titan, one of the tallest and fastest roller coasters in Texas, the legendary Mr. Freeze Reverse Blast launch coaster, the world tallest swing ride Texas SkyScreamer, and classic beloved rides dating back to the park opening. Six Flags Over Texas is the birthplace of the modern theme park industry and a historic landmark in American entertainment.
ov_overview_body.es: Six Flags Over Texas es el parque Six Flags original — el primero en abrir en 1961 en Arlington, Texas. Hogar de Titan, Mr. Freeze, el columpio mas alto del mundo Texas SkyScreamer y clasicos amados desde 1961.
ov_overview_body.fr: Six Flags Over Texas est le parc Six Flags original — le premier a ouvrir en 1961 a Arlington, Texas. Domine par Titan, Mr. Freeze, le plus grand balancoire du monde Texas SkyScreamer et des classiques depuis 1961.
ov_overview_body.de: Six Flags Over Texas ist der ursprungliche Six Flags Park — der erste der 1961 in Arlington, Texas eroffnet wurde. Heimat von Titan, Mr. Freeze, dem weltgrosstem Schaukelfahrt Texas SkyScreamer und geliebten Klassikern seit 1961.
ov_overview_body.it: Six Flags Over Texas e il parco Six Flags originale — il primo ad aprire nel 1961 ad Arlington, Texas. Casa di Titan, Mr. Freeze, la piu alta altalena del mondo Texas SkyScreamer e classici amati dal 1961.
ov_overview_body.nl: Six Flags Over Texas is het originele Six Flags park — het eerste dat in 1961 in Arlington, Texas opende. Thuis van Titan, Mr. Freeze, de hoogste schommelrit ter wereld Texas SkyScreamer en geliefde klassiekers depuis 1961.
ov_overview_body.pt: Six Flags Over Texas e o parque Six Flags original — o primeiro a abrir em 1961 em Arlington, Texas. Lar de Titan, Mr. Freeze, a mais alta balanceira do mundo Texas SkyScreamer e classicos amados desde 1961.
ov_overview_body.ru: Six Flags Over Texas — первый парк Six Flags, открывшийся в 1961 г. Дом Titan, Mr. Freeze и Texas SkyScreamer.
ov_overview_body.zh: 六旗导师大冒险乐园是六旗旅游的原始公园，1961年在特克萨州阿灵顿开放。拥有Titan、Mr. Freeze和全球最高秋千项目。
ov_overview_body.ar: سيكس فلاجز أوفر تيكساس هو متنزه Six Flags الأصلي افتتح 1961.

ov_highlights_body.en: Titan is one of the tallest and fastest coasters in Texas at 174 km/h down a 68-metre drop. Mr. Freeze Reverse Blast launches backwards at 96 km/h to a towering vertical spike. Texas SkyScreamer is the tallest swing ride in the world at 122 metres. Tormenta is the exciting new spinning coaster. Looney Tunes USA is a beloved extensive family area. Judge Roy Scream is a classic wooden coaster beloved since 1980. The park is the birthplace of the Six Flags chain and the modern theme park industry.
ov_highlights_body.es: Titan es uno de los coasters mas altos y rapidos de Texas. Mr. Freeze lanza hacia atras a 96 km/h. Texas SkyScreamer es el columpio mas alto del mundo. Tormenta es el nuevo coaster giratorio. El parque es el lugar de nacimiento del sector de parques tematicos modernos.
ov_highlights_body.fr: Titan est l un des coasters les plus hauts et rapides du Texas. Mr. Freeze lance en arriere a 96 km/h. Texas SkyScreamer est le plus grand balancoire du monde. Tormenta est le nouveau coaster tournant. Le parc est le berceau de l industrie moderne des parcs a themes.
ov_highlights_body.de: Titan ist einer der hochsten und schnellsten Coaster in Texas. Mr. Freeze startet ruckwarts mit 96 km/h. Texas SkyScreamer ist die hochste Schaukelfahrt der Welt. Tormenta ist der neue Dreh-Coaster. Der Park ist die Wiege der modernen Freizeitparkindustrie.
ov_highlights_body.it: Titan e uno dei coaster piu alti e veloci del Texas. Mr. Freeze lancia all indietro a 96 km/h. Texas SkyScreamer e la piu alta altalena del mondo. Tormenta e il nuovo coaster rotante. Il parco e la culla dell industria moderna dei parchi a tema.
ov_highlights_body.nl: Titan is een van de hoogste en snelste achtbanen in Texas. Mr. Freeze lanceert achteruit met 96 km/u. Texas SkyScreamer is de hoogste schommelrit ter wereld. Tormenta is de nieuwe draaiende achtbaan. Het park is de bakermat van de moderne pretparkindustrie.
ov_highlights_body.pt: Titan e um dos coasters mais altos e rapidos do Texas. Mr. Freeze lanca para tras a 96 km/h. Texas SkyScreamer e a mais alta balanceira do mundo. Tormenta e o novo coaster giratoria. O parque e o berco da industria moderna de parques tematicos.
ov_highlights_body.ru: Titan — один из самых высоких и быстрых. Mr. Freeze — запуск назад. Texas SkyScreamer — самые высокие качели в мире.
ov_highlights_body.zh: Titan是干芒关最高最快的过山车之一。Mr. Freeze倒转发射。Texas SkyScreamer是全球最高秋千。
ov_highlights_body.ar: Titan من أعلى وأسرع achtbaan في تكساس. Texas SkyScreamer أعلى أرجوحة في العالم.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Six Flags Over Texas opened on August 5 1961 and was the first park in what would become the Six Flags chain. The name Six Flags comes from the six nations whose flags have flown over Texas. Titan opened in 2001 and was the tallest coaster in the world when it debuted. Texas SkyScreamer opened in 2013 as the world tallest swing ride. The park is located in the heart of the Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex between two of the largest cities in the United States. Mr. Freeze opened in 1998 and was one of the first Premier Rides launched coasters in the world.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Six Flags Over Texas abrio el 5 de agosto de 1961 siendo el primero de la cadena. El nombre Six Flags viene de las seis naciones cuyas banderas ondearon sobre Texas. Titan abrio en 2001 siendo el coaster mas alto del mundo. Texas SkyScreamer abrio en 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: Six Flags Over Texas a ouvert le 5 aout 1961 etant le premier de la chaine. Le nom Six Flags vient des six nations dont les drapeaux ont flotte au-dessus du Texas. Titan a ouvert en 2001. Texas SkyScreamer a ouvert en 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Six Flags Over Texas eroffnete am 5. August 1961 als erster Park der Kette. Der Name Six Flags kommt von den sechs Nationen deren Flaggen uber Texas wehten. Titan eroffnete 2001. Texas SkyScreamer eroffnete 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Six Flags Over Texas apri il 5 agosto 1961 come primo parco della catena. Il nome Six Flags deriva dalle sei nazioni le cui bandiere hanno sventolato sul Texas. Titan apri nel 2001. Texas SkyScreamer apri nel 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Six Flags Over Texas opende op 5 augustus 1961 als het eerste park van de keten. De naam Six Flags komt van de zes naties wier vlaggen boven Texas wapperden. Titan opende in 2001. Texas SkyScreamer opende in 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Six Flags Over Texas abriu a 5 de agosto de 1961 como o primeiro parque da cadeia. O nome Six Flags vem das seis nacoes cujas bandeiras voaram sobre o Texas. Titan abriu em 2001. Texas SkyScreamer abriu em 2013.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Six Flags Over Texas открылся 5 августа 1961 г. Titan в 2001 г. Texas SkyScreamer в 2013 г.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 1961年8月5日开放。Titan 2001年开放。Texas SkyScreamer 2013年开放。

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and head straight to Titan. Mr. Freeze second and Tormenta third. Texas SkyScreamer is best at sunset for extraordinary views over Dallas-Fort Worth. Flash Pass is recommended on busy days. Looney Tunes USA is perfect for families with young children. The park is busiest on summer weekends and Texas school holidays.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve a Titan. Mr. Freeze segundo y Tormenta tercero. Texas SkyScreamer al atardecer para vistas de Dallas-Fort Worth. Flash Pass recomendado en dias concurridos.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l ouverture et allez a Titan. Mr. Freeze deuxieme et Tormenta troisieme. Texas SkyScreamer au coucher du soleil. Flash Pass recommande.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie zu Titan. Mr. Freeze zweiter und Tormenta dritter. Flash Pass empfohlen.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva e vai a Titan. Mr. Freeze secondo e Tormenta terzo. Texas SkyScreamer al tramonto. Flash Pass consigliato.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening naar Titan. Mr. Freeze tweede en Tormenta derde. Flash Pass aanbevolen.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai a Titan. Mr. Freeze segundo e Tormenta terceiro. Flash Pass recomendado.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. Titan — первым. Flash Pass рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往Titan。建议Flash Pass。日落时乘坐SkyScreamer欣赏达拉斯全景。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ Titan. Flash Pass موصى به.

ov_photos_body.en: Titan photographed during the 68-metre first drop against the Texas sky is the defining image of Six Flags Over Texas. Texas SkyScreamer photographed at full 122-metre height with the Dallas-Fort Worth skyline is extraordinary. Mr. Freeze photographed at the vertical spike is dramatic. The park photographed from the oil derrick observation tower showing all major coasters is spectacular.
ov_photos_body.es: Titan fotografiado durante la primera caida de 68 metros es la imagen definitiva. Texas SkyScreamer a 122 metros con el horizonte de Dallas-Fort Worth es extraordinario.
ov_photos_body.fr: Titan photographie pendant la premiere chute de 68 metres est l image definitive. Texas SkyScreamer a 122 metres avec la skyline de Dallas-Fort Worth est extraordinaire.
ov_photos_body.de: Titan beim 68-Meter-Abfall ist das definitive Bild. Texas SkyScreamer auf 122 Metern mit der Dallas-Fort Worth Skyline ist aussergewohnlich.
ov_photos_body.it: Titan durante la caduta di 68 metri e l immagine definitiva. Texas SkyScreamer a 122 metri con lo skyline di Dallas-Fort Worth e straordinario.
ov_photos_body.nl: Titan tijdens de 68-meter val is het definitieve beeld. Texas SkyScreamer op 122 meter met de Dallas-Fort Worth skyline is buitengewoon.
ov_photos_body.pt: Titan durante a queda de 68 metros e a imagem definitiva. Texas SkyScreamer a 122 metros com o horizonte de Dallas-Fort Worth e extraordinario.
ov_photos_body.zh: Titan在第一个下坡时的拍摄是标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Titan أثناء الانحدار هو الصورة المحددة.
